prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! You've got this. I know this task seems daunting, but you're capable of more than you realize. Every minute you spend worrying is a minute you could be making progress. Take a deep breath, break it down into smaller steps, and just start. You'll feel so much better once you begin, and the sense of accomplishment will be worth it. Remember, you've tackled difficult things before, and you can do this too. No more procrastinating - you're strong, you're smart, and you're ready to crush this. Let's go!
